data.title: Add escalate_review to validate-review-output.sh optional_top and array validation
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add escalate_review to validate-review-output.sh code-review-dispatch validation context:
1. Add 'escalate_review' to optional_top set at line 219: optional_top = {'review_tier', 'escalate_review'}
2. Add validation logic: if 'escalate_review' is present, it must be a list. Each element must have 'finding_index' (int) and 'reason' (string). Empty list is valid. Null is invalid — omit the field instead.
3. Validate finding_index values reference valid indices in the findings array.

This change makes write-reviewer-findings.sh accept the escalate_review field via delegation (line 109).

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] escalate_review in optional_top
  Verify: grep -q 'escalate_review' plugins/dso/scripts/validate-review-output.sh
- [ ] Validation accepts valid escalate_review array
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL
